5. ~? [X0] : (orchestra(X0) & ? [X1] : (premiered(X0,X1) & music_piece(X1))) [negated conjecture 4]
6. ! [X0] : (~orchestra(X0) | ! [X1] : (~premiered(X0,X1) | ~music_piece(X1))) [ennf transformation 5]
7. music_piece(symphony9) [cnf transformation 1]
8. orchestra(viennamusicsociety) [cnf transformation 2]
9. premiered(viennamusicsociety,symphony9) [cnf transformation 3]

11. ~orchestra(viennamusicsociety) | ~music_piece(symphony9) [resolution 9,10]
12. ~music_piece(symphony9) [forward subsumption resolution 11,8]
13. $false [forward subsumption resolution 12,7]
% SZS output end Proof for pos.tptp
